## Summary
- What changed:
- Why this change is needed:

## Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore

## Scope
- [ ] UI
- [ ] API

- [ ] Build/Config

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run lint`

- [ ] No breaking changes

## Checklist
- [ ] Small, focused changes
- [ ] Existing behavior preserved
- [ ] Added/updated docs where needed
- [ ] Ready for review
